columns.name: AuthInfoPrincipalEmail

columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.description: Full resource name of the Cloud SQL instance.

columns.description: Type of the resource.

columns.name: InsertId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the log entry.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: Name of the log where the entry is recorded.

columns.name: MetadataType
columns.description: Type of metadata associated with the log entry.

columns.description: Indicates if this is the first log entry in an operation.

columns.description: Identifier of the associated operation.

columns.name: OperationInsertTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the operation was inserted.

columns.description: Indicates if this is the last log entry in an operation.

columns.description: The service that produced the operation.

columns.name: PayloadType
columns.description: Type of the payload in the log entry.

columns.name: ReceiveTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the log was received.
